title: Coding Lab: Mini K-Means
description: Write a minimal K-Means implementation that can cluster 2D points and report inertia.
objectives: Initialize `k` centroids and iterate until convergence
Assign points to the closest centroid
Update centroids as the mean of assigned points
Track inertia (sum of squared distances) each iteration
hints: Use broadcasting to compute distances efficiently
Handle empty clusters by reinitializing their centroid
Run multiple initializations and keep the lowest inertia when using real data
